lyrics.text: Make my bath and kitchen very well
lyrics.translation: 在厨房酣畅淋漓汗水仿若刚洗完了澡

lyrics.text: Je m'en moque, je ne suis pas ta voiture (I don't care, I am not your car)
lyrics.translation: 关我什么事，我又不是你的车

lyrics.text: Don't bell rings so sorry we have to go
lyrics.translation: 别按铃了，很遗憾我们得走

lyrics.text: Pourquoi nous allons? (why do we go?)
lyrics.translation: 我们为什么要走？

lyrics.text: Wash my pants, everything you have to dust
lyrics.translation: 把我的短裤洗了，你要把东西都清理干净

lyrics.text: Je voudrais mais tu n'es pas très gentil (I would like to but you're not very nice)
lyrics.translation: 我本来想的，但是你态度不佳

lyrics.text: I forbid you to wear those kind of skirt
lyrics.translation: 我不许你穿那种裙子

lyrics.text: Laisse-moi être libre (let me be free)
lyrics.translation: 让我自由点吧

lyrics.text: When you walk like that and you wobble
lyrics.translation: 每次你像那样摇摇晃晃走路的时候

lyrics.text: I will like to give you a spanking everytime
lyrics.translation: 我都想给你一巴掌

lyrics.text: When you laugh at me with the others
lyrics.translation: 每次你和其他人嘲笑我的时候

lyrics.text: I will like to read your mind
lyrics.translation: 我都想读懂你的心

lyrics.text: When you walk like that and you wobble
